title: Expert Enchantments
description: Adds new and unique enchants to the game
body:
**Expert Enchantments adds unique enchantments to the game, ranging from simple stat boosts to complex mechanics.**

**This mod requires Apothic Attributes to work, which can only be downloaded on CurseForge**, and has Enchantment Description compatiblity.

List of all current Enchantments (as of v1.1):

| Name             | Effects               | Applicable to    |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Bastion            | Increases Armor by +1 and Armour toughness by +0.35.              | All Armour             |
| Lifesteal            | Has a 10% chance to apply Regeneration for 1 second upon hit. Chance is increased by 5% per level, and Regeneration amplifer is increased by 1 per level.              | Sharp Weapons             |
| Pulsation            | Increases Damage by +1 per level and Knockback by +0.35 at level 1, and an extra +0.25 per level above 1.              | Sharp Weapons             |
| Quick Draw | Increases Draw Speed by +10% per level | Bows |
| Builder's Reach | Increases Block Interaction Range by +1, and +0.5 per level above 1. | Chestplates |
| Sonic String | Increases Arrow Velocity by +20% per level | Bows |
| Turret | Increases Armour Piercing by +5% per level | Bows |
| Steadfast | Increases Knockback Resistance by +100% per level | Leggings |
| Stride | Increases Movement Speed by +10% per level while sprinting | Leggings |
| Swift Strike | Increases Attack Speed by +10% per level | Sharp Weapons |
| Quick Draw | Increases Draw Speed by +10% per level | Bows |
| Vitality | Increases Max Health by +1 | All Armour |
| Warlock | Increases Critical Hit Chance by +5% per level | Sharp Weapons |
| Warrior | Increases Movement Speed by +7.5% per level | Sharp Weapons |
| Immolation | Each hit increases the players Immolation stack count by 1*Level. If the player is above 20 stacks, the attack damage is increased by +1 per level and the victim is ignited | Sharp Weapons |
| Permafrost | Each hit increases the players Permafrost stack count by 1*Level. If the player is above 20 stacks, the attack damage is increased by +1 per level and the victim is inflicted with Slowness | Sharp Weapons |
| Maelstrom | Each hit increases the players Maelstrom stack count by 1*Level. If the player is above 20 stacks, the knockback is increased by +1 per level and the victim is inflicted with Wind Charged. Passively increases attack speed by +0.05 per level. | Sharp Weapons |
| Rampart | Increases Armor by 1*level. | Shields |
| Last Stand: Strike | When hit under 3 hearts, applies Strength II to the bearer for 5 seconds.. | Shields |
| Last Stand: Ward | When hit under 3 hearts, applies Resistance II to the bearer for 3 seconds. | Shields |
| Last Stand: Corrosion | When hit under 4 hearts, applies Poison II to the attacker for 5 seconds. | Shields |
| Last Stand: Confusion | When hit under 4 hearts, applies Blindness II to the attacker for 5 seconds. | Shields |
| Carrier's Swiftness | Increases Movement Speed. | Horse Armor |
| Carrier's Will | Increases Max Health. | Horse Armor |
| Frost Steed | Acts as Frost Walker. | Horse Armor |
| Steed Launch | Increases Jump Strength. | Horse Armor |
| Steed Step | Increases Step Height. | Horse Armor |
| Pegasus' Blessing | Increases max safe fall distance and decreases fall damage. | Horse Armor |

The Enchantments listed below are only available in 1.21.11+

| Name             | Effects               | Applicable to    |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Winged Lunge            | Acts as lunge, but half the power, half the hunger drain, and can only be used when gliding with an Elytra              | Spears             |
| Steed Protection            | Acts as Protection, but for Horse Armour              | Horse Armour             |
| Steed Blast Protection            | Acts as Blast Protection, but for Horse Armour              | Horse Armour             |
| Steed Fire Protection            | Acts as Fire Protection, but for Horse Armour              | Horse Armour             |
| Steed Projectile Protection            | Acts as Projectile Protection, but for Horse Armour              | Horse Armour             |
| Shallow Strider            | Acts as a weaker Depth Strider, but only for Horse Armour              | Horse Armour             |
| Ghastly Glide            | Increases Flying Speed by +25% per level              | Harnesses             |
| Ghastly Inheritance            | Makes the wearer invulnerable to fire damage              | Harnesses             |
| Battle Harness            | Acts as Protection, but for Harnesses              | Harnesses             |
